query_normalized: the impact of social comparison on self-perception in ai-generated image platforms psychology
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (e) by empirically measuring the specific mechanism of "social comparison" (upward/downward) and its effect on "perceived standing and affect" (self-perception) within the relevant domain of social media platforms (Xiaohongshu), even though it focuses on the role of AI-generated content in eliciting these responses.
